nasb.text: Now the young lady pleased him and found favor with him. So he quickly provided her with her cosmetics and food, gave her seven choice maids from the king’s palace and transferred her and her maids to the best place in the harem.

esv.text: And the young woman pleased him and won his favor. And he quickly provided her with her cosmetics and her portion of food, and with seven chosen young women from the king’s palace, and advanced her and her young women to the best place in the harem.

cnv.text: 希該喜悅以斯帖，就恩待她，急忙供給她潔身用的香品和她應得的食物，又給她七個美麗的侍女，都是從王宮裡選出來給她的，再把她和她的侍女搬進女院上好的房子裡。

ccb.text: 希该喜欢以斯帖，就恩待她，急忙给她需用的美容用品和膳食，又从王宫为她挑选七名宫女，让她和她的宫女搬进女宫上好的房屋。
